notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Jake Mangum.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Mookie Betts out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Ward grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Ward hits a grand slam (3) to right field. Andy Pages scores. Freddie Freeman scores. Max Muncy scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
